response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid role, with 15+ years of experience as a senior/staff engineer and strong fullstack credentials matching the tech stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js, relational DBs, AWS). Skills align well with the platform work described, but seniority mismatch raises concerns about retention, salary expectations, and motivation to take an entry-level position. Berlin location matches the on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS directly matching the required stack
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and AI/LLM tooling experience covering nice-to-haves
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role suggests retention and compensation risk
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience (resume emphasizes MongoDB and MySQL)
No demonstrated Nest.js experience, and minimal renewable-energy/construction domain exposure
